rationale: The citing paper’s core constructs are present bias and long-term discounting in intertemporal mortgage decisions, while the cited paper directly develops and tests a mechanism for present-biased/hyperbolic discounting via subjective time perception. Given this strong construct-level alignment and exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.46.4.543), the cited work is plausibly a theory/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
